title: CMS INDUSLAW, Khaitan act on Prestige Estates Projects - SARE Gurugram joint development agreement
description: Prestige Estates Projects Limited has entered into a joint development agreement with SARE Gurugram Private Limited (a joint venture between EKA-KGK and Dhoot) for a premium residential project in Sector 92, Gurugram, unlocking approximately 3 million sq. ft. of development potential across a ~17.21-acre land parcel.CMS INDUSLAW advised Prestige Estates Projects on the structuring, negotiation and execution of of the Agreement.
